task: approach the desk with the black cube on top, stop safely in front of it
prompt:
Task: approach the desk with the black cube on top. Stop safely in front of it without collision.

You are controlling a humanoid robot. The 8 images show recent camera frames from the front camera.

Look at the desk with the black cube on top. Apply these rules in order:

1. STOP if any of these are true:
   - The desk fills more than one third of the image height
   - The bottom edge of the desk is at or below the vertical center of the image
   - The desk appears very large or very close
   - You are unsure if you are too close

2. TURN LEFT BY 15 DEGREES if the desk is clearly in the left half of the image (and rule 1 does not apply)

3. TURN RIGHT BY 15 DEGREES if the desk is clearly in the right half of the image (and rule 1 does not apply)

4. TURN LEFT BY 30 DEGREES if the desk is not visible in the images

5. MOVE FORWARD 20 CENTIMETERS if the desk is centered and appears small or far away

Output exactly one line:
The next action is <action>.

Where <action> must be exactly one of:
- move forward 20 centimeters
- turn left by 15 degrees
- turn right by 15 degrees
- turn left by 30 degrees
- turn right by 30 degrees
- stop
